2604.21593.title: Language as a Latent Variable for Reasoning Optimization
2604.21593.paper_summary: As LLMs reduce English-centric bias, a surprising trend emerges: non-English responses sometimes outperform English on reasoning tasks. We hypothesize that language functions as a latent variable that structurally modulates the model's internal inference pathways, rather than merely serving as an output medium. To test this, we conducted a Polyglot Thinking Experiment, in which models were prompted to solve identical problems under language-constrained and language-unconstrained conditions. Results show that non-English responses often achieve higher accuracy, and the best performance frequently occur when language is unconstrained, suggesting that multilinguality broadens the model's latent reasoning space. Based on this insight, we propose polyGRPO (Polyglot Group Relative Policy Optimization), an RL framework that treats language variation as an implicit exploration signal. It generates polyglot preference data online under language-constrained and unconstrained conditions, optimizing the policy with respect to both answer accuracy and reasoning structure. Trained on only 18.1K multilingual math problems without chain-of-thought annotations, polyGRPO improves the base model (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) by 6.72% absolute accuracy on four English reasoning testset and 6.89% in their multilingual benchmark. Remarkably, it is the only method that surpasses the base LLM on English commonsense reasoning task (4.9%), despite being trained solely on math data-highlighting its strong cross-task generalization. Further analysis reveals that treating language as a latent variable expands the model's latent reasoning space, yielding consistent and generalizable improvements in reasoning performance.
2604.21593.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）減少以英語為中心的偏見，一個令人驚訝的趨勢出現了：非英語的回答在推理任務中有時表現優於英語。 我們假設語言作為一個潛在變量，結構性地調節模型的內部推理路徑，而不僅僅是作為輸出媒介。 為了測試這一點，我們進行了一個多語言思維實驗，模型在語言受限和不受限的條件下被提示解決相同的問題。 結果顯示，非英語的回答通常達到更高的準確性，而最佳表現通常發生在語言不受限的情況下，這表明多語言性擴大了模型的潛在推理空間。 基於這一見解，我們提出了polyGRPO（多語言組相對策略優化），這是一個將語言變化視為隱含探索信號的強化學習框架。 它在語言受限和不受限的條件下在線生成多語言偏好數據，並針對回答準確性和推理結構優化策略。 polyGRPO僅在18.1K多語言數學問題上進行訓練，且沒有思維鏈註釋，將基礎模型（Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct）的絕對準確性提高了6.72%在四個英語推理測試集上，並在其多語言基準上提高了6.89%。 值得注意的是，它是唯一一種在英語常識推理任務上超越基礎LLM的方法（4.9%），儘管僅在數學數據上進行訓練，這突顯了其強大的跨任務泛化能力。 進一步的分析顯示，將語言視為潛在變量擴大了模型的潛在推理空間，從而在推理性能上產生了一致且可泛化的改進。
2604.21593.author: Linjuan Wu et.al.
2604.21593.authors: Linjuan Wu, Haoran Wei, Jialong Tang, Shuang Luo, Baosong Yang, Yongliang Shen, Weiming Lu
